text: Not too impressed with T-mobile taking over. I had to get a new lease for my phone. Have had Sprint for years. Called in went through the dozen promps they asked to save my spot in line would call me back. This happened twice no call. So I later called that evening to wait on hold for 54 minutes then gave up. I chatted in to wait 20 more minutes to talk to someone who ended up not being able to get me a new leased phone. I extended another phone w/ them only bc I don’t have time to shop around. But my next phone WILL NOT BE W/ THEM! If I have to go into a store to actually a SPEAK to someone. All to hear they aren’t very good to the staff that came over from Sprint either.

Since the last two years, coverage in the Lewiston NY area in the Upper Escarpment Subdivision has gotten worse to the point that the whole subdivision behind the reservoir has little or no reception anymore. Downtown is ok due a a tower being close, but on the hill behind the reservoir there is maximum one to two bars reception and a loss of signal with calls.

I've been a customer for T-Mobile for over 16 years. Their mobile applications stinks the text feature on it nobody ever answers and I can't seem to get my dedicated team. When I call I get overseas team that I'm not a fan of so I think it's time that we research and look for a new carrier.. .

edits.text: I have been with T-Mobile for over 16 years. All I want to do is get a simple question answered but yet I have to jump through hoops to get anybody to answer the phone there's no reason that you need my password or do I need a code just to ask how much a product is that your marketing and then when I do call there's a 30 minute wait OMG are you abusing the pandemic as an excuse! For inadequate customer service

text:
If I could rate lower I would. To those already in with T-Mobile don’t go to this location ( 3500 S Constitution Blvd Unit B116 West Valley City, UT) very long wait.

To those thinking about switching to T-Mobile don’t, I thought hmm since T-Mobile bought out sprint they must have better network etc so I Regrettably went to THIS location and was convinced I would be getting a super good deal for switching over and discounts on buying new phones. This location will add on things you did not want to make more money they ask me 3 times if I wanted to add insurance to my phone I said NO, but guess what they still did. Also if your take one of there deals where you buy one phone and get the other one cheaper cuz they will give you “credit” back. They don’t tell you the break up that credit in small amounts a months. Keeping basically you in a contract for YEARS so that way you won’t want to switch to different service cuz then you will lose the credit. Again THIS LOCATION will do this. Now if your going to another place this are the problems you will run into. First off anyone thinking of switching over don’t, the service is “mierda” ( Spanish word look it up) , I have “5G “ and get constant drop calls, slow speed etc. ( I have called in to get this issue fix but they just tell me techs are busy and will call me back, but guess what they don’t) Also just called today to confirm this but you will be on hold for at least at least 40 mins or longer anytime you want to talk to customer service, and then you get some out not from the states that doesn’t know what the heck there talking about. BUT THE WORST is they will say there is no contracts with them, for sure as long as you don’t take one of their “deals on new phones” or any other “promotions” and your are free to leave.

I don't know if it's the low pay that they pay their customer service reps, or lack of training, or they just hire morons, or all of the above, but T-Mobile's representatives are the absolute worse!! They just follow scripts like robots, don't listen to what you say and just read back to you canned responses. They train them to be robots, so why do they even hire people? For simple requests I had to call multiple times until I was finally able to find someone with half a brain who could understand my request and even solve it.

Attempted to open a line in the Lakewood / 75214 location.  Clerk didn't seem very knowledgeable about the plan I sought and after 2 days my number still hadn't ported.  Their help desk was helpless.  I ate the $30 fees to open the line in the store and went back to prior carrier.   Rediculously poor execution.

Went to T-Mobile to purchase a sim card while vacationing in Florida. Asked to install in the Duo sim card slot along with our international sim card. When we got home and opened the sim card slot we realized that the store employee stole the international sim card. When confronted the store, the employee admitted that he shredded our sim card. Neither the store nor corporate office did anything to address the incident.

New prepaid customer went to the store to set it up they were having system issues and charged me 4 times when I called to get it fixed I was on hold for a hour and they said they didn’t see the extra charges. Two days later I went back to the store talked with the store manager and proved the overcharges he called me back later and said they can’t see the charges in the system that I would have to dispute with my credit card which I did. Then to port my old number I had to call twice and on hold for at least an hour each time. It’s ridiculous and I keep asking for the prepaid phone number they give me the same number each time and it gets me to the post pay people this is the worst customer service ever.

Absolute garbage customer service. Every single time you call, you have to re explain your story/problem because they do not notate anything. Long story short, I switched to my company's plan 2 months ago. I was told my last bill would be pro rated for the 4 days it ran into the new month. I get my bill and it was the full amount. I call the first time, girl says she would take care of it and email me a new statement. 3 days later still not having received anything I call again. Guy this time says thats not how it works that under their terms and conditions you have to pay the full last month (which is complete BS - you want $$ for services that I was not using.) He offered me $50 off and I said fine - I paid the rest thinking that was it. I get home today to a COLLECTION NOTICE in the mail for $50. Guy of course didn't do what he said he would do, just like the last girl. UNREAL. Go with someone else, save yourself a lot of headache. I was with this company since I was 18 and they want to treat their customers like this.

Total nonsense: Requested a copy of my Contract from T Mobile ( former Sprint), no reply for several months, playing all kind of stupid games with me. Customers with similar issues, please contact. Sick and tired of their so called "services", about to file a lawsuit #angry

I had an issue with my iphone and talked to Fred...He was so nice and so helpful and I really appreciated his kindness and patience with our issue. He was such a great help in figuring out the problem and helping us fix it.

By reading all this negative reviews I know we need to link up we have enough for Class Action here please reach out to me 323-770-8807 we need to fight for our consumers rights. Do not be a victim fight with me we are paying customers who will get disconnected if you don't pay your bill therefore the t-mobile must satisfy each of us. Reach out to me.

 have been with T-Mobile for 7yrs now I was happy until they merged with Sprint, I had 55 two voice lines unlimited essential plan until beginning last year 2020, problem started happening such adjustments, adding a line without a phone and being charged for it without my permission. I was lied to repeatedly to this day. So I am gonna focus to my data issue August 2020 every time I reached my data to 20g I am losing connections it starting slowing down, they replaced all my sims cards it did not work, they tells me either tower problem etc. etc. it get to a point that I call T- mobile everyday, it seems like no one can figure out the problem to this day, they just keep giving me credits I told them I don't want credits I want the service I paid for to make long story short two month ago rep name Bryan finally told me honestly that I am now in the bottom from priority meaning people pays unlimited they get priority, then people that medium users is in middle priority and T mobile had put me to last priority. So he suggested to get an unlimited Magenta if I reached 50data I will experience some slowdown will this is not the case my phone slows down when I reached 20g T-Mobile are not listening to my concerns. So last month I requested to get the Maximum Magenta for more money to avoid this problem.
1. Why no one notify me the changed.
2. Why my phone slows down when I reached 20g
I screened shots all the graphics on my phones. I am gonna start videoing this problem when I reach 20g it will slows down my connections. I am going to call back today to make sure that this problem do not happen again and keep in mind I don't even use more than 40g a month.

Absolutely horrible. Choose another provider. 
They claimed that since teaming up with Sprint that their service would be great— NOT true. Absolutely horrible. Phone rarely works anywhere other than my house. Extremely disappointed

Welcome to Hotel California
You can NEVER LEAVE💀
T mobile Bills climb without agreements, many years with this provider continued bill discrepancies and hour phone calls.
When tried to get out, they wouldnt finalize bill, supervisors tagged account to one yelling supervisor. Had to get corporate help.Not much better.
Bad device loans., dont honor promotions.
Finally escaped, Dont check in, worse than having a contract. They make excuses to keep billing month after month.

This review is about my own experience with T-Mobil store located at 16615 Lancaster Hwy Charlotte, NC 28277. I received excellent customer service at this location and I would like to thank Mr. Sean Archie for helping us today.

Why is this companies customer service so bad? Spent 8 hours trying to add a Line and upgrade a phone that was broken. Screen stopped responding. Paid off phone need I mind you. It is extremely hard to communicate with a anyone that come on the line. I have spoke to 9 different people be cause the line gets put on hold for 40 + minutes. I was transfered several times and hung up on. Worse customer service I have eve experienced

i just would like to thank Andres from 
2000 el Camino Real T-Mobile store for taking the time to help me and my family to chose the right plans and cell phones after having a horrible experience with AT&T cancelling all our lines and leaving us with out service. I really appreciate that Andres and he's team was there all the way till we got our service back .I personally give him and he's team 5 stars because of he's patience, very knowledgeable on helping me out on calling AT&T and finding out what really happen. Will keep coming back and I will recommend any one to this T-Mobile store ,,

There should be a no star option because these losers, TMobile, are a bad waste of my good time. I used to think Verizon was crap but these unprofessional back peddlers are THE ABSOLUTE WORST!! My daughter has had issues stemming from cell phone price gaps with their jump options to overall cell phone lag. Save your time & money & shop elsewhere!!

I signed up with T-Mobile 5 years ago and we thought they were the best company to work with as their customer service was the best I had ever experienced and i am 70 yrs old. Seems that since they were joined to Sprint the internet service has gotten more unreliable and the excellent level of T-Mobile customer service no longer exists.  You can't contact a phone rep unless you decide to give up an hour or two just on hold.  Don't even think of sending them an e-mail now, you just get an error message. I had always heard people in my area complain about Sprint and it seems as if Sprint's effect on T-Mobile has been a disaster for T-Mobile customers.

Victoria and Jennifer are knowledgeable and gave me excellent customer service.

If you are in the market for a phone go to the store in Neptune on South Main Street.

This is the WORST cell service I have ever had!  My phone hardly ever works, despite it being brand new. My husbands and kids phones do not receive service. The WiFi calling does not run on WiFi, but some antiquated version of that. I would never use T-Mobile or sprint ever again.

Really horrible ... Internet at home doesn't work, because tmobile is using KPN's cable....and so slow client service.... Today the phone's internet doesn't work.... And very wired network connection problems.. Can't use certain app on the phone due to network problems

We bought new phones from Sprint before they were acquired by T-Mobile. We literally have a receipt from Sprint showing a monthly $20 credit per line.  T-Mobile says we are mistaken because they don't see that promotion in the system.  When we told multiple departments through the escalation process that we want to forward them the email receipt, they say they cannot receive emails. This is ridiculous. T-Mobile is horrible! We've spent close to 4 hours on the phone with them. No progress. It feels like they put us on hold just hoping we hang up and leave them alone.  So frustrating!

Longtime customer (12+ years). I went to the store to purchase a replacement phone for my daughter, the rep told me about the latest deal to get the Samsung S21 for free with a qualified trade-in. I stupidly agreed to trade in my loved Samsung Note 10+ and regretted the decision as soon as I left the store. I tried to call and cancel the trade, even reaching out to customer service to see if they could help. I contacted the store as soon as they opened the next morning and the phone was gone. My phone was much better than the S21 and now I am stuck with another phone payment ($13.54/month for 24 months). This is not what I was told or agreed to. I spoke with Customer Service and they fed me a line of BS. This is not how you treat customers. Extremely deceptive practice.

So I called T-Mobile to change one of my phone plans, and shortly in the conversation I was told about a promotion where I could get a Galaxy Tablet for only $11 a month (part payment for 24month) so close to $264 for a tablet that costs $150 at Best Buy. Anyway I accepted the promotion and got the tablet. Today I received a copy of my monthly bill, and discovered that the $11 was not the real additional cost, but also $68 for an added mobile internet line!!!!! I had no interest in adding another line, so when I called to cancel this line and return the tablet, I was told that the agreement states 14 days return policy. I did not receive a copy of the agreement, and as I did not get the bill before today, there was no way I could have reacted within 2 weeks! I have now terminated that line but will still have to pay $68 for this billing circle and the next one. So total $136 for something I never ordered. This is a total SCAM so please just hang up if you received any sales calls from T-mobile. Personally I will move all our lines to a different provider. This it absurd!

AWFUL! I was just trying to get a tiny crack in my screen fixed, but the stores gave me the run around. Another 3rd party store wouldn’t do it because I only had the assurion insurance and then when I called to file a claim, I couldn’t remember the exact date the incident  happened being that id been running around trying to get it foced for white sometime so u made a date up and my claim was denied. So now I’m pretty much stuck with an iPhone with a cracked screen AND the only explanation I got was “it’s policy”. 
My phone is in perfect working condition just has a small crack in the screen. I pay insurance EVERY MONTH, I think it’s only fair to get issues like this resolved whether it happened 2 weeks ago or two years ago as long as my bill is paid regularly. Ridiculous!

Mark the super "helpful" over the top gushing "expert" lied to me about canceling my iPhone 11 order that I placed this morning! He left me with the impression that the order was canceled when in FACT IT WAS NOT CANCELED!!! He even sent me a text with a confirmation link! But the link wasn't to confirm that my order had been canceled! No, the link he sent was to confirm a $20 credit on my next bill for accidentally ordering the wrong phone! If telling lies is T-Mobile's policy then I'm going to take my business elsewhere!!! Because their  so-called experts don't know what they are doing!!!

I just needed to cancel service, since I didn't get a signal in my area (for home internet). But was shuffled to a couple different reps and spent over an HOUR on hold. Very frustrating. Just turn off the service.
By the way.... I'm still on hold.

TMobile rep failed to ensure she fully explained the requirements of splitting a line, and further failed to ensure everything was signed and returned via email. Now I'm stuck with the cost of a handset I don't have because they'd rather hide behind technicalities and legal jargon than go after the other party. What irks the most is the TMOBILE rep created his account during the call, so it's not like they don't have his information to recoup the funds for the handset. Or even make the rep hold some responsibility. Six years of loyalty absolutely wasted -- and that's with the bullcrap "we don't have many towers in your area" spiels to explain poor reception and dropped calls regardless of my location. Cricket works better in some places! Tuh, c'est la vie, eh?

I've been without a phone for 3 weeks, T-mobille has promised me a phone through my phone insurance.I came into Tmobile with a Verizon phone therefore there were somethings Tmobile had to accomplish to get me a phone. I was promised a phone and never received it because they were waiting on my approval to upgrade my phone because they no longer sold it. Give who called me to give approval no one. I called 3 times now and I've been promised a call back in 24 hours each time. The only answer I get is my manager is working it and you'll get your phone in 2-3 days. Well, again it's been 3 weeks and no phone nor a call back, I always have to call them for an update. If you don't have to use Tmobile don't!

I wish I did not had to give a star for T-mobile. They have the worst customer service ever, I am glad I transferred to a different company. When they give you a free tablet even after I phrase myself on “are you sure.” They said yes and now they want to charge me for $229.96 for the free tablet? This is insane. Now I am sitting here calling them trying to figure this out since I was giving the wrong the information from the customer service who gave me the free tablet. It’s the worst.
The service is slower than the estimates, latency is very high.  The cancellation process is horrible.

In December 2020 we bought two iphones for half price and the customer presentative said an A11 we could get for free so we bought it too, the A11 was all the time charging bad quality didn't work until March 12 2021 was completely dead, we paid the phones in February there we found that they also charge for that free A11 $150?? I don't recommend this place,bad service and funny deals.
Two-hour wait times for customer service. If you get a call back good luck getting someone who speaks English!
Had connection issues and low network speed, was helped by Ryan, extremely knowledgeable and was able to quickly resolve the issue and explain to me what the issue was

Want to go back to the 90's? Well then use TMobile where you will have dropped calls, no service in the middle of major metro areas and hour-long waits for customer service.  Been with them for over 10 years, but the last two years have been horrible. Time to say goodbye to T Mobile.

Tried the Home Network Gateway and it didn't work for me so I'm trying to get a return label. Tried calling yesterday, 2 hr. wait called later, still 2 hr wait. Calling Tonite and been on hold for 1hr and 17mins so far.
When I ordered, was told I could return to store, but no, you can't and their app is not working either! Nobody to chat on website. Ask me again, TM, if I'll recommend you to family and friends!!!

As a 15 yr customer the time has come to go to another carrier. T Mobile promises are "hollow words". The CS dept is in the Philippines. Even though they advertise "your own team of experts". No you don't, you will wind up talking to a person that barely understands the phone issues. On average you will be on the phone for hours.
Also, I am tired of the Covid being used for poor service. Poor service is because of poor management.

edits.text: T Mobile is not the best company. Any review site that says that must be paid. They have long wait times 45 min+. Many times the so called experts are in another country. They can't help because they are reading out of a book. They don't really know how phones work, so the 45 min was wasted. Cell phones need better Gov regulation, they currently get away with murder. But T Mobile is the worst, because they lie about customer happiness.

I have been a T Mobile customer since 2003. I am changing! The service is so bad now. I was on the phone for 2 hours with 5 techs and none could fix the issue. Problem is they are from the Philippines. They don't understand English and are reading out of a book of responses. They never answer a question that doesn't have a "previous" question in their book. I have 5 lines and can only see one online. What's up with that?  Do not choose these guys, pay more because you won't get any monies worth with T Mobile. I,m checking out the other carriers.

text: Tmobile has been awful. They have horrible reception. After months of poor phone service and having to call my customers on Facebook and snapchat they send me a refurbished phone that does not alow calls to come in. They then hang up on me because I say I want to be reimbursed for lost calls, time and work. My customers have been emailing me saying they cannot reach on my phone no matter where I am. It's been so stressful and the worst experience I've had with a phone provider. I have switched to AT&T. They are cheaper and much more helpful.

TMobile had the nerve to shut off my cell phone during a pandemic for a balance of $17.48. I am disabled and do not have a landline. TMobile has my email and phone number they could have notified me prior to cutting on my service due to issues with my debit card. Shame on TMobile you are grimmy. I'd prefer to pay more for my service than to keep doing business with a company that has no compation for humanity.

I have been with Tmobile for over 20 years.  I transferred my service to Xfinity Mobile on 12/10/21, and still paid Dec's bill in full because I didn't called to transferred but did online transferred.  Yet, they still charged me for Jan & Feb.  Sent my bills to collection for those 2 months that I already cancelled my service.  I did called to paid my December's bill in Full early December, and was promised $25 gift card, which I NEVER RECEIVED.  Why am I paying for Service that I canceled months ago?  What kind of business is this?  I received the collection bill on March 9.  I called Tmobile, and they told me that they didn't see any balance on my canceled account.  So, W.T.F is this?  Trying to collect bogus $ and ruined people credit?  Over 20 years of paying your BS Service is not enough?  Ruined people after they transferred out of your company??  I would give Tmobile a -10 stars if I could.  From now on, I know what to tell everyone I know.
Terrible customer service. I ordered new phones and service, couldn't get them activated, spent 5 hours with multiple agents, dropped my call, dropped my chat. Avoid at all costs!

Today, I called an agent to get an upgrade which I am eligible for. Got "disconnected" got transfer after transfer was on hold for up to 30 minutes. I am currently going on a 3 hour CAll with them to get a simple phone upgrade. I got offered a Deal and then they took it back. Super annoyed.

In the world for cell phones; I first started out with a  Black berry. T-Mobile was my carrier. It froze and some how I went to get it looked at but the Sprint rep. came to me and I was dooped into that carrier. I always had a problem with billing. I then came back to T-mobile. I moved to a remote place and traveled often; I felt I had to change my carrier again so I went to Verizon. Customer service by phone was horrible; picking up a new phone at the Roxbury location was awful. Billing was atrocious. I had to abandon ship even though I still owed for the device.  I am now convinced that T-Mobile was always my home. I am back and never leaving again. The Mount Olive location is where I found my first love back. Everyone at this location has been helpful in me obtaining  my new phone. The manger CIHAN HAZER  truly came through. He continued to follow up with me to ensure all my questions and challenges were resolved. He has a great personality, Very knowledgeable as well as very professional.  I would recommend any one who is looking to switch from those other carriers to T-MOBILE. The Mount Olive Location is where it's at.

Horror! 
Internet, which is supposed to be fast, according to the service package from T-mobile, then this Internet actually does not work for a whole year, and T-mobile only responds with words, but has not done anything to troubleshoot for a year!
I don’t recommend this company.

I only gave them one star because you could not give a review without rating with at least one star.
They do not deserve a star. They are the worst company, I will never do business with them ever again.

They don't like to give money back. I have two incidence

#1) Personal I went in one of the stores to get a phone everything I liked they didn't have I am talking like 4 choices. Then we found one they said they had so I signed up, gave them my information paid, They came back out said they didn't have it, so we cancelled didn't want any part of their unorganized company. I did not want to be their customer.
5 MINUTES WAS LONG ENOUGH.
It took calling them for 5 months they kept charging me monthly fees I wasn't a customer!!
They actually threatened to turn me over to collection because I paid nothing for 6 months and used absolutely no data. What jerks!!


# 2) **Business the company I work for decided to try them, they were cheaper. 
We had them exactly 20 days, the coverage was horrible, we kept getting dropped calls.
We cancelled and went back to AT&T,
**The kicker is they pulled $872.35 out of our account for 20 day usage of our own phones.
It was only supposed to cost $130. I called every week for 5 months.
You can never speak to the credit department.
Every time I called that person would handle it, not to worry, HEARD that about 570 times!!!
they said if not satisfied within 30 they don't charge you anything *WHAT A JOKE!
They are all a bunch of liars and thieves!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I submitted a claimed to T-Mobile on 01/30/2021 to replace a phone. They said the phone will be delivered at the T-Mobile store within 3 business days. Today is 33 days later, after I submitted the claim and yet I haven’t received any phone.  On 02/12/2021, I called T-Mobile customer service they provided me the tracking number and still nothing yet.

This has been the absolute WORST “customer service” experience of my life. The support phone number connects you to people who tell you what you want to hear and then advise you to call back in 24-48 hours to confirm the changes. But when you call back, they have no record of any previous contacts. I’ve been lied to every single time I’ve called. We only had service for about 2 weeks in December. It’s now the middle of March and our bill is STILL not resolved. My Verizon service may be more expensive but at least it works and, when I call Verizon customer service, they actually take care of my concerns. IF YOU ARE THINKING ABOUT SWITCHING TO T-MOBILE, DO NOT DO IT!!!!

I just have to say James B from the colorado call center is so nice!!!!! He helped me so much I was so irritated my phone calls kept dropping and texts not sending and he gave me advice he did so many amazing things for me like waive delivery fees, put credit into the account. He was so helpful and he really made me such a happy customer. I have to say this here he was the head senior technician at tmobile and he truly truly cares about the customers. I'm always nervous about who I'm going to get but I was so happy to talk to James B he was so friendly honestly and really made it his goal to do whatever he could to make me happy. He really made me feel comfortable and helped me as much as he could. Anyway, I hope other people get him or anyone else from Colorado call center and they will help you I promise!! Please also leave a review or ask to speak to their supervisor when you have a good experience with someone, we are so used to leaving bad reviews or giving supervisors bad feedback about the representatives, but if someone does a good job please let their supervisors know!

Dylan Von Sloten is an outstanding T-mobile expert. I was impressed with his excellent customer service skills. He demonstrated the ability to carefully listen to my phone issues. He displayed effective people skills in meeting, addressing, and resolving my phone issues. He was pleasant, patient, and knowledgeable in implementing a new phone service for me. I see him as a Valuable T-Mobile employee. If I need to return to T-Mobile store, at 2100 S. E. 164th Ave. suite A106, I prefer to ask for Dylan to assist me.

Terrible online service.  It's impossible to get a live person on the phone for customer service, the app is constantly crashing or locking me out and forcing password updates.  The online site is excruciatingly clunky and slow and never saves any of my information.  I've also had trouble with auto payments not going through and then my service being canceled.  Wouldn't suggest it to anyone if you aren't absolutely desperate.

It looks like the employee manual has a clause on how to lie to customers. Otherwise, how to explain the fact that different employees at different times lie so in the same way. They promise to send an email confirming their words, but they never do. Instead, they all will teach you in the same way how to check your email.
Even if you manage to break through this first barrier, other people will also lie to you about the email that confirms their word, which you will never receive. But instead very soon you will receive a bill, although you never became their client.
And the carousel Merry Go Round called T-MOBILE will go in a new but the same circle...

i went to T-mobile store at 2025 N.Bechtle Ave in Springfield Ohio and was greeted as soon as i walked in the employees at this location are extremely knowledgeable in their products and very helpful with the setup of my new a21 phone and helped me get through some of parts that i didn't understand. I would recommend this store and also the great products that T-mobile sells

Very helpful at the E League City Pkwy store. I dealt with Ashley and Corey. Both were very helpful.
Cassie Ridenhour
This service is bull, full bars of 5g and I get 5 mpbs down and 1 mpbs up I suggest you don’t waste your money on this for the service they give go with att or Verizon much better than this

Tmobile Is a total pice of garbage there internet takes for ever sometimes I I'm using my phone for work and it takes for ever to download or open a new window Iguassu please stay away from this phone provider I'm moving to Verizon way way better service Tmobile suppose have 5G that's a lie its super slow if I could ill give em a NEGATIVE 5 star

edits.text: Tmobile waiste of money the service they offered is garbage is garbage don't know why sprint decided to go to tmobile now it's garbage everyone gives the 1 star if there were negative il give them negative 5 service sucks

text: Opened an account 2/15/21 and closed it 2/17/21 cuz I was still under a contract with another company. I tried to get the $30.80 back that they charged me when I opened the account. I was supposed to get the SIM card in 2 days. Got it on 3/2/21. Now they have charged me an auto monthly payment of $43.85 and only want to refund $20 even though I couldn’t have used the account til I got the SIM card. Guess my bank is going to dispute this for me. Also, they had me go to one of their stores for help getting the $30.80 back but the store doesn’t do that kind of transaction. Really frustrating. Will NEVER sign up with them.

Terrible!!! If I can give them a “no stars” I would. I came into the store today. I’ve been here for 6 hours, they changed my plan without authorization and won’t change it back! 

Terrible service!!!

I had just transferred my cell phone to T-Mobile. But unfortunately the coverage was an adequate so I had to leave. I want to give a huge shout out to Autumn who resides in Colorado Springs. She worked tirelessly on my account getting everything as it should be. T-Mobile has one terrific customer service rep. 
Autumns skill set, follow-through, and pleasant attitude made me wish I could have stayed with T-Mobile. 
Please reward her for the wonderful work she does. 
Mary Ellen Martin

Worst mobile service provider

I moved over from verizon because of the lucrative deals they were offering but it turns out to be such a bad decision on my part. There just does not seem to be any concern about the customer service or customer concerns and today for no apparent reason i cannot seem to get any service. Stay away from T mobile.

I was a Sprint customer but since this merger I have had nothing but issues and now my phone doesn't get a signal at all. Calling and going into tmobile store for a new Sim card did NOT fix the issue! I will see what happens when they call me back tomorrow but no my phone is not old or damaged their updates did this and no one knows how to fix it.  Will likely be changing companies soon!

T-mobile is #1 in my book. Never had an issue with billing or phone service. They are better and less expensive than others. I have their Revvell phone and for $200 you can't beat it. I'm on my phone all day with calls and research and it keeps on going. .

My complain is about T mobile coverage. I absolutely do not recommend it. I switched yesterday, because  Kevin Navandi, Retail Store Manager, did it because "T mobile is the most reliable coverage." Today in the morning, I lost an important meeting called because the number that" I dial is not in my plan". Now, I need to spend time to come back to the store and switch to sprint service that I had before. Today in the morning, I called to T mobile customer service, 1 817 698 4199, I was trying to fix the problem and make my important call, but I couldn't because Stephany, the sweet lady who answered my phone call, Couldn't help me. She couldn't explain why I couldn't make my call that I always make with sprint service before. She said that there are several reasons why I can not make that call. I gave her the phone number that I tried to call and she ask me if I made another calls in the United States to verify that my phone is working and I answered " I'm talking to you dialing you from my phone," she said " Did you call somebody in United States with your phone to see if your phone is working?"( I couldn't get the answer).  Yesterday, When I went to the store, He didn't ask me " can I change the coverage to T mobile? or Can I open your phone to install the T mobile SIM card?" just He did just promised that my phone is going to have better connexon (He open my phone and installed  T mobile SIM card). I believed in what he said but It wasn't better connexon because I cound't make my important called. I really appreciate the intentions that  Kevin had because his attitude was to help me and give me better cell phone service. It wasn't. Thanks very much for the assistance that Kevin and Stephany provides  excellent customer services. It is sincerely appreciated. they are polite, nice and do excellent job. My complain is about T mobile coverage.

They have the literal worst website I've ever had the pleasure of using. You can't log on with a computer because it thinks you're a bot, you can't pay over the phone since thats an extra $10 fee. You can't do automatic payments unless you're in a contract. Random fees on top of your bill that you can't dispute. They also have spotty service even though they "merged" with sprint.

Wife needed a new phone .. went to store 1001 on 3551 parkway village ct. winston salem, nc. Store mgr. Johnathon was one of the best customer service person. He asked what my wife ( Cathy ) needed and then proceeded to show her several options. He could have up sold her to a more expensive phone but advised her she didn't need to. Also got a great deal ( trade in ). He even called us after the sale to see if everything was good. T mobile has never disappointed us in over 18 years and employees like Johnathon will keep us coming back . Thank You !!!
Signal coverage is always weak at best.

I had high expectations when the cell phone person at the booth was telling me how great they are and how they drove from Texas to my state through small towns and never lost service and if there isn't T-Mobile service it would work off of Verizons network but my parents have Verizon and they get calls and all I ever get is I have a new voice-mail even though it's rare if my phone ever rings even if I'm in the capital town it still doesn't ring. Maybe they are great in other big towns in other states like California but I'm switching to AT&T when my sim card gets here in a couple days and I'm hoping they are significantly better for just less than $10 more per month than the Magenta plan I am on at T-Mobile. The customer service for me on the other hand has been great. I came from my parents plan with Verizon but I won't become another person paying an outrageous amount of money for a cell phone bill per month. I might upgrade to a 5G phone with AT&T but they don't have 5G yet in my state. I literally sit and wait for an app to load and it just closes when I go to watch and add and then at first it was a surprise but now I'm surprised if the app doesn't close. I'm just surprised how terrible the cellular service is. Customer service has been great and they offered me to talk to someone to troubleshoot my phone but I doubt that would actually get me to the point of being satisfied with the cellular service. I've taken pictures of things trying to load which is a waste of my memory on the phone but it's pretty much an all day thing.

T-Mobile is terrible customer service, they take your money but wont never assist u if u have a problem, I have a business account and u would think that it would account for something, My phone has been crack for over a week no replacement phone was given to me. no repair yet. I'm loosing alot of money and they don't care, I called and I'm complaining everybody just push u off to the next person,  would never recommend t=mobile 
T-MOBILE IS TERRIBLE

We'd been a T-Mobile customer for several years and decided to try a different carrier that was less expensive. In December 2020 we called to cancel the account (no Internet-based option to do this). We settled up a balance, were told the account was closed, and then received a bill. Turns out one line had not been cancelled. So, against our better judgement, we paid the extra month for that line, and were told the account was fully closed. Got another bill. Customer Service was not helpful, so tried Facebook. They were not helpful. Sent a letter to the Customer Service VP who did not respond. So, filed a complaint with the FCC. ... It's like no one fully knows what's going on, and one action doesn't trigger another. It's to their benefit to string you along and get a few more bucks out of you. Funny thing is that we weren't that unhappy with T-Mobile to begin with. But after this experience, we would not consider them an option in the future.

I have been with T-Mobile over a decade and I think long and hard before I write a bad review.  Management you have work to do.  You will lose your long term people.  I will not keep my company nor my account nor my kids under your umbrella.  I bought a watch and within a short time product is useless. The accountability you showed and red tape to return it was insurmountable.  Do not showcase something you can not stand behind and do not send customers on wild goose chases.  We are real people out here.  Finally after seeing no way out of the mess I had to get the watch reordered and do you think I even got notified when the darn thing came in?  Heck no!  Really annoyed customer with bad taste in mouth no totally and completely wanting to bolt.  I will say nice young employees at local store. Bravo to them for rising above whoever runs this company gone wrong!

T-Mobile deserves no star.  Their employee committed fraud by allowing a non consensual permission by adding an unauthorized user to my account, who then added an  Apple watch without my permission.  Concerns were addressed
to their customer service representatives and complaints were filed with BBB  and FCC and Tmobile fraud department.

TERRIBLE!! I switched and was promised credit for both new phones when I traded in our current phones. I sent both phones in, and only got credit for one. Then they told me the promotion was buy one get one....THEN WHY DID THEY TELL ME TO SEND BOTH PHONES IN?!?
Also made me put 750 dollars down and no one can answer when I’m getting that back. Worst mistake ever!! STAY AWAY!!

Bad decision ever! We swich to T-Mobile on November last year.. it is very disappointing. Be carefull about their promotion programs! How they promised about the price promotion it is different than we get after we sign for it. Customer service bad, signal is bad.. Everytime we try to complains, they have 1001 excuses, but never fix the problems. 
The price for the trade in is not as promised, they said that we don’t understand about the promotion (note: they write it down in a piece of paper, that is a proof!). 
At the end they give the price for the promotion that they promised, but:
1. They cut the price of my trade in phone (note: is a apple XR in a good condition!) how come it is only value $181
2. The phone is for 5G, but we only get LTE and it is only 1-2bars signal. We have been experiencing since we start swich our phones on Nov2020, they excuse that they have some work being done in the area that has started back around 12/29 and is set to be completely finished by 02/19. Now they said that is my area is bad cause there is a river 😂. They told us to just keep use our own WiFi for help to cover the signal. The question is: why other can have good signals, why can u?

T-Mobile not only favors certain customers, but their customer service is awful, which is a big deal because since I always for some reason have issues I have to contact them. As a student I’m currently on a prepaid plan and they don’t have any features or support for it and it’s hard to pay my bill because their app is useless if you’re a prepaid customer. Ive had to call customer service so many times because I couldn’t even set up my Tmobile ID, and they didn’t know how to help me. Multiple instances where the customer service had no idea what to do or what they were doing and instead would just argue with me instead of trying to maybe get someone else to help. I try to be as nice as I can but I get attitude in return. Horrible!!

Horrible/Nightmare customer service! the worst of my life. Corporate customer service supports their retail businesses to con their customers. Do not, I repeat, do not ever join T-mobile. The biggest mistake of my life!

Well, let's start with, my daughter and I walked in the T-Mobile store with frowns and feeling a bit confused. Leaving Metro Pcs after  25 years wasn't  going to be easy. Being very loyal customers we were very nervous. I must say meeting with Madison Piper Mobile Expert, we soon walked out of store 7842 in Clearwater all smiles. Madison Piper was just very kind and smooth on explaining all information to us. My daughter knows more about these new phones but was confused. I being a senior know nothing about new phones, plans ect felt worried about my choice to switch from Metro Pcs. Let me tell you Miss Madison went over and above what we both expected. In no time we felt relaxed and excited about our purchases and choice. She help me with apps. She showed me how to maintain my phone so I drain less power ect. Madison Piper was awesome. My rating of her and her service was a 10 across all boards, she knows and did her job well. Thank T-Mobile and again, we look forward to a long relationship. Thanks Madison  Piper my daughter and I give you a  ( 10 ) we are Extremely satisfied!

To pay my bill with T Mobile it is a nightmare!  T Mobile customer service is a nightmare.  I hate T Mobile  customer service. Takes over an hour to pay my bill every month! Customer service laughed when I told them it takes an hour to pay my bill every month.

I'm a t-mobile customer for many years I've always been very satisfied with them .one day I walk into the t-mobile store in my town where I always pay my bill and so the person I made contact with that day tells me about a offer they had in which I get a free table and all I had to do is pay for the line I really didn't need one but my wife like it so I said ok what's the person tells me the deal again I get a free tablet when I add a line to my service and all I would pay was $10.00 when yes I did and still am so after a year later which is today I call so they can take the tablet off my account but it turns out that if I disconnect the tablet I would have to pay $90.00 for a tablet that at that time I was told is was free and all this time I had and still have wasn't free at all I can still remember that day the person that attended me said not just but my wife to heard the person say THE TABLET IS FEE ALL YOU PAY IS $ 10.00 FOE THE LINE .I can say without a doubt I'm  that I don't feel the same for t-mobile. And as for you t-mobile you broke my heart

I always thought t mobile was a great carrier until I upgraded my phone. I sent in my old phone for a credit, thought they gave me enough credit to pay off, but nope, they kept my phone and still have to pay off my balance on it too. Ripped me off of $400 and the customer service sucks too.

I sign up with T-Mobile in Dec, at the time i was told i get a 3 new phones for an exchange with my old phone which was iphone 10x, i never got the return label i called them more then 10 time and i got run around saying that someone will call me back they never do and now after 2 month they say that i have to pay for all my phones because i did not send in my old phone.  I hate T-Mobie they lie to people and cheat them just to sign up with them.  Now there telling me i need to pay or i can just sell the phone get pay them.

I have been with T-mobile for over 5 years and I don’t know what happened, but the last few months it has been an absolute nightmare.
Their customer service is terrible. I call in and get the run around after waiting on hold for an HOUR and then there is no manager (one is supposed to call me back within 72 hours!)
Went to 2 different store locations and both locations told me to contact customer service by phone. Absolute lazy attitude and too busy playing games on their cell phones to actually help with anything. 

I am going to switch companies. I suggest others follow suit.

one hour plus hold times, horrible customer service that keeps repeating themselves, "don't worry", but never actually solve anything.  why oh why do I even bother doing business with this horrible company!?!?!?  After being on hold for 1 hour and spending 22 minutes on the phone with a representative, I've been transferred to yet another representative....between today and my 90+ minutes on the phone last week, that is 3 hours of my time I will not get back!!!!!

I would give zero star if I could. Employees/Customer Service team at T-Mobile are unprofessional, does not respond, and most importantly, cant solve simple issues like unlocking a phone. They keep saying that they are not responsible to unlock the phone when the phone is locked by a carrier. I am switching to Verizon, and will not recommend T-Mobile to any of my network.

The worth internet provider on cells!!!

I have a prepaid plan, which is refilling on time or before due date! But I don’t have an internet access for over than 10 hours!!!! Awful line, awful service!!! Not recommended!!!

I had the absolute BEST experience with the manager Melinda here in Greenwood SC. She was very knowledgeable & professional . Now , last week i didn’t have quite the same experience at the other tmobile store & was dissatisfied which lead me to her store . Thanks again for your service .

I had an issue that I was told was taken care of back in july. Now I'm finding out it wasnt taken care of as promised. I've called and been promised return calls to solve this, that never happens. I'm not happy and hopefully I won't be with tmobile much longer.

I've been with t-mobile for over 12 years and now I just can't take how much there service and internet have dramatically decreased. Stay in town and constant 2 to 3 of 4 signal bars and no internet. Pay for 5G plan and get less than expectations. Very upsetting! Needs immediate improvement.
Absolute trash! Third world mobile internet is faster. Lebara recommended.

T mobile deserves zero stars. Poor service after the Sprint merger.   We had ONE BAR for service or none so resorted to wifi calling. Also, we had countless dropped calls and NO INTERNET in a Covid world when our son needed data at school.  After being a loyal autopay customer for YEARS, T mobile sent us a COLLECTION bill 2 weeks after we terminated service.  (We were out of contract for 6 months).  Oh, that final bill wasn't much, we paid it but made copies to show our friends online why this company is not the best choice for honest customers.
Great service very helpful guys I’ll definitely be back!!!!

I was a T-Mobile customer for 18 years and recently decided to make the switch to Verizon. BEST DECISION EVER! I called in to make my final payment with T-Mobile back in November and had not heard anything from them until last week (now we're in February). That I had another bill because it took 3 days for Verizon to get my numbers imported, SO TMOBILE WANTS TO CHARGE ME FOR A WHOLE MONTH OF SERVICES WE DIDN'T HAVE! The gentlemen I spoke to as soon as I got that letter from T-Mobile had stated to me that him and his supervisor were working on  my case and that they would get my bill credited and that I didn't owe anything to call back 5 to 7 days later to make sure everything was finalized. Well here we are 7 days later and they are telling me there is NO WAY they will help and now I'm stuck with a bill I didn't have service with T-Mobile that month and they dinged my credit for 90 days past due! (DROPPED MY SCORE 35 POINTS) SHAME ON YOU T-MOBILE! THIS WAS NOT MY FAULT I WOULD HAVE TAKEN CARE OF THE BILL BACK IN NOVEMBER!

We have had nothing but trouble with T Mobile since Sprint merged with them.
We upgraded our phones with our "free upgrade" and got charged $300 for each one ($900 total). Got that mess fixed after multiple calls.
We qualified and got the Govt Employee discount for hubs phone, tax exemptions, and the Freedom Plan for the other phones. And yet, they somehow removed both discounts and our tax exemptions AND changed our plans with our consent "to a cheaper (for them not for us) plan" THEN said they had no record of us applying for it. BUT miraculously found it when I confirmed the email stating they received it and it would be applied. THEN our bill shot up every month over $100-150, same song and dance every month. Only last time I spoke with a supervisor and told her I would not be remaining as a customer if I had to call them every single month to correct our bill. She "guaranteed" me it was fixed and would not change and gave me an exact amount it would be. BuT, SAME THING THIS MONTH. Only now, another "supervisor" said there was "no way our bill is that price." 
After a lengthy discussion, him basically calling me a liar and saying they "had no record of anyone guaranteeing that price and that my bill was correct" and me explaining that we never authorized anyone to "change our plan"  and that breaking a guarantee/making changes to our plan without consent would be a breach of contract costing them more than us, they somehow confirmed I did indeed speak to someone. (Imagine that?) And all this after I KEPT saying it was a call, not a chat. He just couldn't get past the fact that I CALLED instead of chatting with a rep. Now we DO have that "low price" for a year now because they DID record the "guarantee" we were given and it is contractuaĺly valid for 12 months, even though they believe it was in error. BUT NOT A SINGLE APOLOGY.
At least it gives us time to pay off our last few credit cards and change companies. 
Never had these issues with Sprint. And we will not be staying with T Mobile for the whole contract.  Worst company we have ever dealt with. 
ALWAYS ask for the conversation transaction number and keep it.  Can't wait til we leave. They broke the contract so many times that we documented and recorded that we can walk away and owe them nothing after only a few months with them. In the end, they lose thousands to depreciated equipment and lost and broke our contract. Per an attorney, we are free of them when we choose to be, which will be very soon.
Worst merger ever. Worst customer service. Natasha was great. Marvin was horrible but back pedaled when I gave him my saved information.
Keep your records! Saved us over $5900 in all with them.

We switched to T-Mobile because it was saposeto be cheaper there is no service most of the time my phone won't ring and sometimes text messages take hours to come through. This has been the worst phone service we have ever had. We were told it may take time because they are putting new towers up. But it has been close to 2 years now and it has only gotten worse. Before anyone switches do research and make sure to ask people before you make the switch, I wish I had looked into it before switching.
OMG... T-Mobile is the best. My screen protector was cracked and they fixed it within minutes. And it was amazingly perfect. I highly recommend T mobile!!!

We had a mix up in service for our cell phones.   Kiera from store #3059 was most helpful.  She sorted out our problem with a great deal of patience and overwhelming knowledge.  She showed leadership beyond her years.  We know that she will exceed wherever she placed.  Wonderful experience!!!  We will travel twenty five miles to receive such components service.

Dear t mobile I hope you plucking gargle a Dick. I bought a brand new 5g phone from you. And I still loose service and you "can't explain it".

I was a Tmobile customer for seven years! Finally, I had to make the switch to a different carrier because I had no service where ever I went. They have made my life hell! It has been two months almost three since we left and they have no problem charging me still! every time I call I get hung up on, or "I am sending this to a supervisor, they will email you."
